title: Phra Aphai Mani: The Prince's Flute
description: The prince whose magical flute-playing enchants even sea ogresses — Thailand's most beloved literary hero.
introduction: The prince whose magical flute-playing enchants even sea ogresses — Thailand's most beloved literary hero.

translation.text: Phra Aphai Mani played his flute, and the sound carried across the sea, enchanting all who heard it.
